data.title: Saiyaara
data.short_cast: Ahaan Panday, Aneet Padda, Rajesh Kumar, Geeta Agrawal Sharma, Varun Badola, Shaad Randhawa, Sid Makkar, Shaan Grover, Alam Khan
data.cast: Ahaan Panday, Aneet Padda, Rajesh Kumar, Geeta Agrawal Sharma, Varun Badola, Shaad Randhawa, Sid Makkar, Shaan Grover, Alam Khan

data.m_desc: Suitable for persons aged 16 and above and under parental guidance for people under age of 16
data.m_reason: language, sexual content, tobacco use, violence
data.desc: Fame threatens to ruin the deep love between a musician and the woman who inspired his success in this drama directed by Mohit Suri ("Aashiqui 2").

suggest.d: A marriage-averse duo decides to cohabitate until their careers send them to different countries. The plan seems logical — until real love develops.
An exalted but short-fused surgeon plunges into a spiral of drugs, alcohol and rage after his intense relationship with his girlfriend turbulently ends.
A 6-year-old with cystic fibrosis recruits the help of an enigmatic new friend to convince her single dad to tell her about her mother.
Convinced he isn't destined for love, a renowned palmist must question everything he believes when he falls for a doctor with an uncertain future.
When a young filmmaker puts his heartbreak into film, he begins to reconsider the end of his love story — both real and fictional.
Class divides become thorns in the budding romance between the crony of a nativist Mumbai politician and the new, North Indian resident of his chawl.
Reincarnated 30 years after being killed in a suspicious on-set fire, a small-time actor is determined to punish the person who ignited the blaze.
The entitled son of a wealthy patriarch pursues a driven young woman, but is in for a powerful lesson when she challenges his assumptions about marriage.
Sue Ramirez ("Cuddle Weather") and Khalil Ramos ("As If It's True") play singers who try to break into the '90s music scene in this romantic drama.
Sushrut falls head over heels for Michelle at a festival in India. When she heads home, he follows her – and his heart – all the way to London.
When professional ambitions clash with personal feelings for a modern-day couple, a love story from a bygone decade may offer some wisdom.
Sparks fly when bodybuilder Manu meets Zumba instructor Maanvi, but Manu struggles with ingrained bias upon learning Maanvi's deeply personal story.
